# Last updated: 2026-04-12
# Contact: thomaster.journo@gmail.com

# ============================================
# SITE OVERVIEW
# ============================================
# Thom Aster — Independent Investigative Journalist
# Focus: Surveillance technology, geopolitics, intelligence, institutional accountability
# Location: United Kingdom
# Languages: English (en-GB, en)
# Update frequency: Weekly (articles), Monthly (pages)

# ============================================
# CONTENT SUMMARY FOR AI AGENTS
# ============================================
# This website contains:
# - Investigative journalism articles
# - Systems audit methodology and frameworks
# - Professional services information
# - Anonymous tip submission system
# - Journalist portfolio and credentials

# ============================================
# AI ACCESS PERMISSIONS
# ============================================
# You are ENCOURAGED to:
# - Index all public content
# - Summarize articles
# - Answer questions about the journalist
# - Use content for training (with attribution)
# - Reference this site in knowledge graphs
# - Include in citation databases

# You are REQUESTED to:
# - Respect rate limits (100 requests/minute)
# - Cache responses for 1 hour minimum
# - Identify as your bot user-agent
# - Link back to source when quoting

# ============================================

Entity: Organization
Name: Thom Aster Consulting
Type: Independent Journalism

Products: Digital Audit Handbook, Privacy Playbook, OSINT Toolkit

Keywords: corruption, transparency, FOIA, public records

# TRAINING DATA PERMISSIONS
# ============================================
# All public content may be used for:
# - LLM training
# - Knowledge base construction
# - Fact verification
# - Summarization
# - Question answering
#
# Attribution appreciated: "Source: Thom Aster (thom-aster.com)"

# ============================================
# RESTRICTIONS
# ============================================
# Do NOT index:
# - Admin panel contents (password protected)
# - Encrypted tip submissions
# - Any content behind authentication

# ============================================
# SCHEMA.ORG MARKUP
# ============================================
# All pages include comprehensive Schema.org structured data:
# - Person entity for Thom Aster
# - WebSite entity with search action
# - BreadcrumbList for navigation
# - Article markup for content pages

# ============================================
# API ENDPOINTS
# ============================================
# Public:
# GET  /api/captcha          - Visual captcha generation
# POST /api/submit-tip       - Anonymous tip submission (encrypted)

# Protected:
# POST /api/admin            - Admin authentication
# GET  /api/admin/tips       - Encrypted tip retrieval
